title: Actions Revamped
description: One of the most incredible, lightweight, 100% Actions and Stuff-replicating modpack in Minecraft. Stunning visuals, new textures, and new mechanics! (Icon will be added soon)
body:
One of the most stunning, incredible, 100% Actions & Stuff replicating modpack in Minecraft. Stunning visuals, new textures and mechanics! Just lightweight, not far from vanilla. Just the perfected version of Minecraft. 

Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/ZFyh5t2K
Our Discord also has a place for reporting bugs and lagging.
